---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE REQUEST]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve?
Explain the situation where the current behavior is not ideal.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this feature should work.

Example:
- new setting
- new screen
- improvement to existing feature

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Additional Context
Add screenshots, mockups, or examples if relevant.

## Impact
Who would benefit from this feature?

- [ ] Students
- [ ] Teachers
- [ ] Admins
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Other: __________
